scripts.deploy:web: BASE_URL=/app/ NODE_OPTIONS=--experimental-global-webcrypto node_modules/.bin/vite build && aws s3 sync dist/ s3://photo-visor-295936871972/app/ --delete && aws cloudfront create-invalidation --distribution-id E2JW5PYKNPPYOB --paths "/app/*"
scripts.deploy:android: NODE_OPTIONS=--experimental-global-webcrypto node_modules/.bin/vite build && npx cap sync android && ANDROID_HOME=/home/patito/Android/Sdk JAVA_HOME=/home/patito/android-studio/jbr android/gradlew assembleDebug -p android && /home/patito/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb install -r android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk
scripts.deploy: echo 'Use deploy:web or deploy:android separately. Running both risks overwriting the S3 build.'
scripts.build:demo: vite build --config vite.config.demo.ts && mv dist-demo/index.demo.html dist-demo/index.html
